choose.when: AND attend_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)

mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.member_id, m.name AS member_name, m.gender, a.type, a.attend_date, a.check_in_time FROM attendance a JOIN member m ON a.member_id=m.id
ORDER BY a.attend_date DESC, a.check_in_time DESC
SELECT a.id, a.member_id, m.name AS member_name, m.gender, a.type, a.attend_date, a.check_in_time FROM attendance a JOIN member m ON a.member_id=m.id WHERE a.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (member_id, type, attend_date, check_in_time) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{type}, #{attendDate}, #{checkInTime})
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.member_id, m.name AS member_name, f.freeze_start, f.freeze_end, f.reason, f.created_at FROM member_freeze f JOIN member m ON f.member_id=m.id WHERE #{date} BETWEEN f.freeze_start AND f.freeze_end ORDER BY m.name ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS frozen, SUM(CASE WHEN m.gender='MALE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS frozenMale, SUM(CASE WHEN m.gender='FEMALE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS frozenFemale FROM member_freeze f JOIN member m ON f.member_id=m.id WHERE #{date} BETWEEN f.freeze_start AND f.freeze_end
